creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
There is an upstream project for this, with
https://github.com/dbaio/portsfallout as the
project's place for https://portsfallout.com/ .

The upstream project is not part of FreeBSD
and not maintained by FreeBSD. Its official
repository is not on FreeBSD servers, but
instead on github.

Why not submit problem reports to the upstream
project instead of someplace the developer is
not using to develop or maintain the project?
That place is at least directly tied to the
author/maintainer (dbaio).

Avoidin ghte upstream as where to have problem
reports seems odd to me.
